product_questions: Q1: Can we infer a usable contract from a live public event feed in one shot?
Q2: Do magnitude / tsunami / status enums catch bad sensors without rejecting null optional fields?
Q3: Does mixed batch (~10% fail) produce a pilot report a gov data team would care about?
